task: Restore the ResearchOps home page styling for the 8-step grid and next-action columns after the GOV.UK x-include page chrome change.
findings: The Sass source for the home grid components still existed.
The rendered home page used an unversioned ResearchOps home stylesheet URL.
The previous route-state test did not assert the Sass desktop grid contracts or the versioned home stylesheet URL.
implementationDecisions: Keep src/styles/researchops-home.scss as the source of truth for the home page components.
Harden the Sass grid tracks with minmax(0, 1fr) and defensive sizing properties.
Version the ResearchOps home stylesheet URL in the source template and checked-in rendered page.
Do not commit a manual generated CSS patch as the source of truth.

validation.testUpdated: tests/govuk-frontend-integration-route-state.test.js now asserts Sass grid contracts, versioned home stylesheet usage, and rendered home component classes.

requiredFollowUpValidation: Browser-check desktop home page grid and next-action columns
